No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to ending hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to health, well-being, or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: As a PhD course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3). The core competency of understanding 'sustainability considerations of business situations' directly aligns with Target 4.7, promoting knowledge for sustainable development.

Gender Equality.reason: While 'social responsibility' is mentioned, there is no explicit or strong implicit evidence in the course text to support a direct link to gender equality targets.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to energy access or renewable energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course's focus on developing original business models and research capabilities directly promotes innovation and higher economic productivity (Target 8.2). Understanding 'sustainability considerations' also aligns with decoupling economic growth from environmental degradation (Target 8.4).

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's core objective to 'develop original business models' and 'research capabilities' directly fosters innovation (Target 9.b) and enhances scientific research and technological capabilities (Target 9.5).
evidence: 發展獨創商學模型、架構、與流程的能力
發展必要的研究能力為學術界貢獻

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to reducing inequalities.

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to sustainable urbanization or community development.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: The course's core competency B, 'understand and identify sustainability considerations of business situations,' directly aligns with Target 12.6, which encourages companies to adopt sustainable practices and integrate sustainability information.
evidence: 理解與辨別商業環境中道德、社會責任與永續議題

Climate Action.reason: The course's emphasis on 'sustainability considerations of business situations' can be reasonably inferred to include aspects of climate action (Target 13.2), though the link is not explicitly stated in the syllabus.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to terrestrial ecosystems or biodiversity.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course's core competency B, 'understand and identify ethics, social responsibility... of business situations,' directly relates to fostering accountable institutions (Target 16.6) and reducing corruption (Target 16.5).
evidence: 道德、社會責任與永續議題

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description links its content to global partnerships or means of implementation for the SDGs.
